name: ABRAMAK
industry: Communication, Command Control, and Information Technologies, Information Technologies, Electronic & Electromechanical Systems, Electronic Warfare and Directed Energy Technologies, Cybersecurity, Software and Artificial Intelligence, Unmanned Systems, Space Technologies and Satellite Systems
address: İstanbul Teknoloji Geliştirme Bölgesi Sanayi Mah. Teknopark Bulvarı No: 1/4A Blok No: 113-114-115 34906
about: ABRAMAK Information Technologies was established in December 2016 as a joint-stock company with three partners. Vision To enhance national technological capabilities in all forms of wired and wireless data communication among all elements in both tactical (battlefield) and strategic (command headquarters) environments, and to become a globally recognized authority in this field through its contributions and developments. Scope of Activities To ensure uninterrupted, secure, and lossless data communication among all elements in tactical (battlefield) and strategic (command headquarters) environments by developing all types of devices, protocols, systems, integrations, and technologies based on national capabilities. ABRAMAK Information Technologies has developed the Ship Integrated Communication System – ACCMS concept in order to protect our nation’s rights and interests and to meet the operational and mission requirements of the Turkish Armed Forces. Based on an IP-based, modular, and open architecture design, the ACCMS (Advanced Communication Control Management System) provides technical and operational solutions for all classes of naval platforms through its integrated communication capability. ACCMS utilizes the latest technologies and features interfaces capable of seamlessly integrating both legacy and modern communication components. National & Indigenous Systems and Solutions The systems and devices we have developed entirely as domestic and national technologies are listed below: ACCMS (Software-Based Advanced Communication Control and Management System) – operates independently of any specific system or device UTS (Software-Based Multi-Functional IP User Terminal – Voice Terminal) S-AMPS (Message Handling System) ABR-PAS (Software-Based Ship IP Alarm & Public Address System) ABR-TSB (Software-Based Ship IP Telephony System) ABR-GBS (Ship Information Management System)

name: AC PROJE TASARIM
industry: Aircraft and Aviation Technologies, Electronic & Electromechanical Systems, Unmanned Systems, Cabling and Power Distribution Systems
address: Saray OSB MAh. G2 Caddesi No:7 Kahramankazan / ANKARA
about: Founded in 2003, AC Tasarım Inc. is a leading technology company that develops and manufactures high-performance EMI cable shielding and protection solutions for the defence and aerospace industries. Exporting more than 85% of its production to customers worldwide, our company continues its operations at its modern manufacturing facility located in the HAB Organized Industrial Zone in Ankara. Continuously expanding its global operations, AC Tasarım operates in the United States through AC Tasarım USA Inc. as a manufacturing and technical support center, while AC Tasarım UK Ltd. provides sales and logistics services across Europe and worldwide. Our company is also the sole authorized distributor of Holland Shielding Systems in Türkiye, Azerbaijan, and the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus (TRNC). In addition, our products reach global markets through strong international distributor networks such as Digi-Key, TTI RayQ, WireMasters, Sea Wire, FDH Aero, Astute, Empa Electronics, Navea Electronics, Swelex, and Cambridge Technologies. Technology and Quality Standards With an annual production capacity exceeding 5 million meters, AC Tasarım carries out its manufacturing activities in compliance with the AS/EN 9100 aerospace quality management system standards. In tin- and nickel-plated copper braid products, our company is one of the three manufacturers worldwide holding the VG 95211 certification, and at the same time the only AA59569-D (MIL-SPEC) manufacturer in Europe. Our high-technology product, AeroBraid™, offers up to 75% weight advantage and 4.8 times higher tensile strength compared to conventional cable shielding solutions. Thanks to these superior features, AeroBraid™ is preferred in many critical platforms, particularly unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), satellite systems, and avionics applications. Contact: www.actasarim.com.tr | [email protected] HQ: HAB OSB G2 Caddesi No: 7 Kahramankazan, Ankara, TURKİYE USA: AC TASARIM USA Inc. | 309 N Park Dr, Suite 104, Rock Hill, SC 29730 UK: AC TASARIM UK Ltd. | 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ

about: Adıyaman Cable Connector Inc. (AKK) was established on June 7, 2024, with the aim of making a strategic contribution to Türkiye’s aviation and space industry by producing mission-critical aviation cables, connectors, and cable assemblies through high-technology and flexible solutions. The company aims to provide the design, development, mass production, and after-sales services of cable, connector, and cable assembly systems in compliance with relevant standards, utilizing domestic and national capabilities. Beyond being solely a manufacturing company, AKK was founded to create a qualified workforce in Adıyaman, enable technology transfer, and contribute to the socio-economic transformation of the region. By developing advanced technology solutions for various sectors—primarily aviation, automotive, energy, and telecommunications—we bring our engineering expertise to the global stage and create sustainable value in the international market.
